name: OpenSearch domain not deployed in a VPC
description: This OpenSearch domain is publicly accessible (not in a VPC). Public OpenSearch endpoints can be accessed from the internet, and even with fine-grained access control, the attack surface is far greater than a VPC-private endpoint.
remediation: Migrate the domain to a VPC. Create a new VPC-attached domain and reindex data. Use VPC security groups and IAM policies to control access. If public access is unavoidable, enable fine-grained access control and enforce HTTPS.
